'''wokasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spaceshiplike|spaceshiplike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spaceshiplike|spaceshiplike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wokasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokasithi|wokasithi]] || [[word:wokasiji|wokasiji]] || [[word:wokasishi|wokasishi]] || [[word:wokasiki|wokasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokasuthuthu|wokasuthuthu]] || [[word:wokasujuju|wokasujuju]] || [[word:wokasushushu|wokasushushu]] || [[word:wokasukuku|wokasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokasuthu|wokasuthu]] || [[word:wokasuju|wokasuju]] || [[word:wokasushu|wokasushu]] || [[word:wokasuku|wokasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokasufthuf|wokasufthuf]] || [[word:wokasufjuf|wokasufjuf]] || [[word:wokasufshuf|wokasufshuf]] || [[word:wokasufkuf|wokasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokasethe|wokasethe]] || [[word:wokaseje|wokaseje]] || [[word:wokaseshe|wokaseshe]] || [[word:wokaseke|wokaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokasothotho|wokasothotho]] || [[word:wokasojojo|wokasojojo]] || [[word:wokasoshosho|wokasoshosho]] || [[word:wokasokoko|wokasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokasotho|wokasotho]] || [[word:wokasojo|wokasojo]] || [[word:wokasosho|wokasosho]] || [[word:wokasoko|wokasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokasofthof|wokasofthof]] || [[word:wokasofjof|wokasofjof]] || [[word:wokasofshof|wokasofshof]] || [[word:wokasofkof|wokasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokas챦fth챦f|wokas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fj챦f|wokas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fsh챦f|wokas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fk챦f|wokas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokas챦fth챦fth챦f|wokas챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fj챦fj챦f|wokas챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fsh챦fsh챦f|wokas챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fk챦fk챦f|wokas챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokas챦fth챦f|wokas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fj챦f|wokas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fsh챦f|wokas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fk챦f|wokas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokas챦fth챦f|wokas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fj챦f|wokas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fsh챦f|wokas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:wokas챦fk챦f|wokas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokas챈th챈|wokas챈th챈]] || [[word:wokas챈j챈|wokas챈j챈]] || [[word:wokas챈sh챈|wokas챈sh챈]] || [[word:wokas챈k챈|wokas챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokasathatha|wokasathatha]] || [[word:wokasajaja|wokasajaja]] || [[word:wokasashasha|wokasashasha]] || [[word:wokasakaka|wokasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokasatha|wokasatha]] || [[word:wokasaja|wokasaja]] || [[word:wokasasha|wokasasha]] || [[word:wokasaka|wokasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokasafthaf|wokasafthaf]] || [[word:wokasafjaf|wokasafjaf]] || [[word:wokasafshaf|wokasafshaf]] || [[word:wokasafkaf|wokasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wokasasha|wokasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokash챘sha|wokash챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokasrosha|wokasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokasmusha|wokasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokasyasha|wokasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokasnksh챘sha|gowokasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokasnkrosha|gowokasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokasnkmusha|gowokasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokasnkyasha|gowokasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wokakasasha|wokakasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokakash챘sha|wokakash챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokakasrosha|wokakasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokakasmusha|wokakasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokakasyasha|wokakasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokakasnksh챘sha|gowokakasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokakasnkrosha|gowokakasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokakasnkmusha|gowokakasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokakasnkyasha|gowokakasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wek챈sasha|wek챈sasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wek챈sh챘sha|wek챈sh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wek챈srosha|wek챈srosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wek챈smusha|wek챈smusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wek챈syasha|wek챈syasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowek챈snksh챘sha|gowek챈snksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowek챈snkrosha|gowek챈snkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowek챈snkmusha|gowek챈snkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowek챈snkyasha|gowek챈snkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wokfasasha|wokfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokfash챘sha|wokfash챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokfasrosha|wokfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokfasmusha|wokfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokfasyasha|wokfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokfasnksh챘sha|gowokfasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokfasnkrosha|gowokfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokfasnkmusha|gowokfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokfasnkyasha|gowokfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
